expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width],[Height],[Depth] 是整体尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu cho tấm gỗ trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu cho tấm gỗ phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales para sa itaas, ibaba, at gilid ng tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales para sa likod ng tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: နှာခေါင်းပြčnýတွန်း၏ဆိုင်းဘက်ဆွဲ လှွတ်တပ်ပါ ဘတို့ [Width], [Height], [Depth] အချွတ်ကိုရှင်းလင်းသည် [BoardThick] ချတ်အဖုံးနှင့်လှုံ့ခေါင်း။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ទំហំ​បន្ទះ​សម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺ​ជា​ទំហំ​សរុប [BoardThick],​​ គឺ​ជាធាត់​បន្ទះ​ខាងលើ​ខាងក្រោម និង​ខាងចំហរ​​ [BackBoardThick],​​ គឺ​ជា​លំអ្រឹង​គ្រាប់​ខាងក្រោយ​​。 (AI translated, please check)
